name: emqx-realtime-sensor-dashboard
title: EMQX realtime sensor dashboard
creator: birdy
notes: 2026-07-01: Moved SpO2 data ownership to the AD8232 SLE client path. Extended ecg_sle_packet to v2 ECG+SpO2 vital packets while keeping v1 ECG decode compatibility. Client role now compiles MAX30102 BSP + spo2_processor and sends latest SpO2 metric over SLE with ECG. Server role decodes the vital packet and updates EMQX ECG + SpO2 snapshots; independent 14_spo2_sensor remains a UART debug sample and does not write EMQX directly. Validation: git diff --check passed; ws63-liteos-app -ninja generated/signed the app image, but top-level command still exits nonzero because nested ws63-loaderboot rebuild does not inherit -ninja and hits an existing CMake generator cache mismatch.
